ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Company phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Company email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Company physical address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the salary belongs to */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the company */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rate for the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_openings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job opening */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the job belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job opening */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job opening */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Experience required for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_openings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_job_openings" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job opening */,
  "num_openings" INTEGER /* Number of job openings for the company */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date when the job opening was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_company" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the company (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary history entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the salary belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary for the company */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary was effective */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_opening_history" (
  "job_opening_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job opening history entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the job belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job opening */,
  "num_openings" INTEGER /* Number of job openings for the company */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the job opening was effective */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date when the job opening was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_opening_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_opening_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user interacted with */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity the user performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the user performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_trends" (
  "industry_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry trend entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the trend belongs to */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "insight" TEXT /* Insight about the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_trends_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)
